ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters or inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms or pounds */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* User's preferred privacy settings (e.g., public, private, friends-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "start_time_iso" TEXT /* Start time in ISO format */,
  "start_time_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the start time */,
  "start_time_offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the start time from UTC */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "end_time_iso" TEXT /* End time in ISO format */,
  "end_time_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the end time */,
  "end_time_offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the end time from UTC */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walk, run) */,
  "actual_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the activity */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "heart_rate_avg" REAL /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_min" REAL /* Minimum heart rate during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_max" REAL /* Maximum heart rate during the activity */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the activity log (e.g., complete, incomplete) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the activity log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the activity type */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity */,
  "altitude_gain" REAL /* Altitude gain during the activity */,
  "gps_data" TEXT /* GPS coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the wearable device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., walk, run, cycling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" REAL /* Calorie burn rate for the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the wearable device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the wearable device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who set the goal */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the activity type for the goal */,
  "target_distance" REAL /* Target distance for the goal */,
  "target_calories" REAL /* Target calories to burn for the goal */,
  "target_steps" INTEGER /* Target number of steps for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress toward the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_participants" (
  "challenge_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge participant */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user participating in the challenge */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the user in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
